name: I'm at the foot of a mountain
description: I'm at the foot of a mountain
hints: At the foot of the mountain. You can see a ledge about 15 feet up with a small peak.
LOOK MOUNTAIN to see the ledge. You need a rope or line to climb up. CLIMB MOUNTAIN asks 'How?'
THROW LINE with 20 ft of phone line to create a climbing route to the ledge. Then CLIMB to ascend. SOUTH to parking lot (room 18). WEST to lake (room 21).
Get the phone line, THROW LINE at the mountain, then CLIMB to reach the mountain ledge (room 23) where the quartz is.

effects: Message: a ledge about 15' up with a small peak.

notes: Foot of the mountain. THROW LINE with 20 ft phone line creates a climbing route. CLIMB MOUNTAIN without the line asks 'How?' LOOK MOUNTAIN shows ledge 15 ft up. SOUTH to east parking lot (room 18). WEST to cold lake (room 21).
